### All the Dropbox code was generated by an AI (ChatGPT 5.4) and it appears to be... working?

Why? Because I hate working with commercial APIs and the absurd amount of code needed to handle all the authentication stuff, so I just had an AI do it for me. That's it.

It seems to be working fine, but I haven't tested it much yet.

One thing I'd like to point out is how clever it was for the AI to create the `DropboxBassFile` as well as the `DropboxBassFileStream` classes, which are used to handle the streaming of the audio files from Dropbox.  
This way, we can use the same code for both local files and Dropbox files, which is pretty neat.
